The '''ORS (orbital repair satellite)''' was built during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] by [[Loratus Manufacturing]]. It was used to fix starships and serve as drydocks for starships off mission. After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] the Imperial Fleet attempted to use these satellites so they could repair and regroup at the Imperial shipyards at [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] but were thrown off by the pursuing Rebel Fleet and the invading Zann Consortium Fleet which ignited the [[Battle for the Eclipse|Battle for the ''Eclipse'']]. The [[Mon Calamari Orbital Shipyards]] used these for the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
